Maximum Solar Yield

Engineered for performance. Built to endure. Westrong autonomous cleaning robots deliver up to 8%+ more power generation — at 8× the speed of manual crews — with zero panel damage.

Power Generation Boost
The Challenge

Dust Is Costing You Money

Every day your panels go uncleaned, you lose revenue. Research shows dust accumulation can slash solar output dramatically — and manual cleaning isn't the answer.

📉

Efficiency Loss

Duke University research confirms: panels left uncleaned for just one month in arid regions lose 17%–25% of their power output. After two months, losses reach 25%–35%.

−35%
⚠️

Manual Cleaning Risks

Traditional manual crews cause micro-cracks and surface coating damage through walking pressure and abrasive tools. Long-term panel degradation leads to premature replacement costs.

Hidden Damage
💰

Rising Labor Costs

Managing large manual cleaning teams is expensive, slow, and inconsistent. A 20MW station can lose over ¥2 million annually from suboptimal cleaning alone.

¥2M+
Product Lineup

From compact rooftop arrays to utility-scale mega-farms — we have a robot built for your exact requirements.

The Westrong Difference

Efficient. Premium. Durable.

Three principles drive every robot we build. Engineered from the ground up to outperform — and outlast — the competition.

01
⚡

Unmatched Efficiency

More panels cleaned per hour means lower operational costs and faster ROI. Our robots are engineered for speed without compromising quality.

  • Up to 6,000 ㎡/h cleaning throughput
  • 8–10× faster than manual crews
  • Dry brush + wet wash dual mode for 3× standard efficiency
  • One-pass complete coverage — no blind spots, no missed areas
  • 4.5+ hour continuous runtime on a single battery charge
02
✦

Premium Engineering

Every component is precision-selected. Automotive-grade electronics. Brushless motors. AI-powered navigation. This is industrial robotics at its finest.

  • Automotive-grade CAN bus communication architecture
  • High-precision gyroscope stabilization chip
  • AI intelligent navigation & autonomous decision-making
  • Ultrasonic + TOF laser dual-perception safety
  • 5 interchangeable brush types for any surface condition
03
🛡️

Built to Endure

Desert heat. Coastal salt spray. High-altitude UV. Our robots operate reliably in the harshest environments on Earth — backed by rigorous testing.

  • IP65 full protection — dust-tight & water-jet resistant
  • Operating range: −20°C to 60°C
  • Track system with bonded-seam locking — zero-slip in wet & dry
  • Non-destructive cleaning: no micro-cracks, no coating damage
  • Hundreds of component-level durability tests per model
Performance by the Numbers

Data-Backed Results

Over GW-level cleaning experience. Continuously upgraded. Field-proven across 20+ countries.

🔋
8%+
Higher Power Generation vs Manual
⏱️
10×
Faster Than Manual Cleaning
👥
60%+
Fewer Personnel Required
🌍
20+
Countries Worldwide
Clear Advantage

Robotic vs Manual Cleaning

The choice is clear. Our robots outperform manual crews in every metric that matters.

Metric Manual Cleaning Westrong Robot
Cleaning Speed ~200–500 ㎡/h per person Up to 6,000 ㎡/h
Personnel Required 10–20+ workers for medium farm 1 operator for multiple robots
Power Generation Boost Baseline 8%+ higher than manual
Panel Damage Micro-cracks & coating damage Zero damage — lightweight, anti-slip design
Consistency Human-dependent, uneven quality Full coverage, no blind spots, uniform pressure
Safety High-altitude risk, liability exposure Remote operation, multiple safety sensors
Hard-to-Reach Panels Impossible with simple tools Adapts to 0–60° tilt, complex arrays
Operating Conditions Weather & terrain dependent −20°C to 60°C, IP65 rated, all terrain
Proven Results

Real-World Performance Data

Independent PR (Performance Ratio) testing across diverse sites. Here's what our robots deliver.

+43%

Xingxing Home Appliance Factory

Severe Industrial Pollution

PR improved from 49% to 70% after a single Westrong cleaning pass — a 43% relative gain in power generation efficiency.

Before: 49%
After: 70%
+45%

Suqian Tianlan Station 2

Severe Pollution — Same Period Comparison

PR surged from 56.5% to 82%, a 45% improvement under severe dust conditions at a ground-mounted station.

Before: 56.5%
After: 82%
+24%

Bridgestone Facility 2

General Pollution — Continuous Monitoring

PR improvement from 69% to 85.87%, demonstrating consistent performance on moderately soiled commercial rooftop arrays.

Before: 69%
After: 85.87%
+22%

Bridgestone Facility 1

General Pollution — Temperature Corrected

From 77% to 94% PR, proving that even moderately maintained panels see significant returns from precision robotic cleaning.

Before: 77%
After: 94%
Technology & Quality

Engineered to Excellence

From our R&D center in Jilin to our Shanghai headquarters, every Westrong robot embodies a decade of continuous innovation.

  • 🔬

    Dedicated R&D Center

    Our Jilin R&D base focuses exclusively on photovoltaic cleaning robotics — deep integration of hardware and software, from motor control to autonomous navigation algorithms.

  • 📜

    Complete Patent Portfolio

    Utility model patents, software copyrights, invention patents, and trademark protection — a full lifecycle IP management system creating solid competitive barriers.

  • ✅

    ISO 9001 Certified

    Certified quality management system by WSF World Standards Certification. Every robot undergoes rigorous factory testing before shipment.

  • 🏆

    Award-Winning Innovation

    National High-Tech Enterprise (2022). "Maker China" Innovation Competition Excellence Award. Joint robotics research center with Shanghai University.

  • 🔧

    Custom Engineering Capability

    We design and build custom solutions — from rust-removal robots to flexible panel cleaners and insulator spray systems. If it needs cleaning, we can engineer it.

Trusted Worldwide

Powering the Industry's Biggest Names

Our robots clean panels for the world's leading energy companies and photovoltaic manufacturers.

SPIC Trina Solar China Huadian SUNGROW Arctech Solar Jinko Energy CHNT Datang International State Grid China Southern Power Grid AKCOME SUMEC
Global Reach

Deployed Across 6 Continents

From the deserts of Saudi Arabia to solar farms in Brazil — our robots are cleaning panels in 20+ countries.

🇨🇳 China 🇦🇺 Australia 🇧🇷 Brazil 🇻🇳 Vietnam 🇹🇭 Thailand 🇸🇦 Saudi Arabia 🇵🇰 Pakistan 🇹🇷 Turkey 🇪🇸 Spain 🇮🇹 Italy 🇭🇷 Croatia 🇺🇦 Ukraine 🇰🇷 South Korea 🇯🇵 Japan 🇬🇧 UK 🇫🇷 France 🇺🇸 USA 🇦🇷 Argentina 🇦🇹 Austria 🇬🇹 Guatemala 🇵🇭 Philippines 🇲🇾 Malaysia
